event: response.created
data: {"type":"response.created","response":{"id":"resp_fail","object":"response","created_at":1700000000,"status":"in_progress","model":"gpt-4o","output":[],"usage":null},"sequence_number":0}

data: {"type":"response.in_progress","response":{"id":"resp_fail","object":"response","created_at":1700000000,"status":"in_progress","output":[]},"sequence_number":1}

event: response.failed
